title: vitex trifolia var. taihangensis
intro: Vitex trifolia var. taihangensis, also known as Taihang Vitex, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Taihang Vitex are said to include the treatment of fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Taihang Vitex is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in the form of tinctures and capsules, to leverage its medicinal properties.
